# vellum-design-system.css

Vendored from [vellum-assistant](https://github.com/vellum-ai/vellum-assistant)
`assistant/src/runtime/routes/assets/vellum-design-system.css` (last commit before removal: `067bc4aa52^`).

Refresh when upstream restores app design-system injection:

```bash
git -C ../vellum-assistant show '067bc4aa52^:assistant/src/runtime/routes/assets/vellum-design-system.css' \
  > apps/tables/vendor/vellum-design-system.css
```
